DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-20-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. VERIFIED, OBJECTION-FREE, RESPONSES AND RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS (IF APPLICABLE) SHALL BE SERVED WITHIN TWENTY DAYS OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,074 ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFFS AND IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. SANCTIONS ARE PAYABLE WITHIN THIRTY DAYS OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Defendant City And County Of San Franciscos Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. RICK SHEINFIELD, ESQ. of San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3872) for Defendant/Cross-Complainant City and County of San Francisco;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel.

Defendant/Cross-Complainant stipulates to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for Defendant/Cross-Complainant authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's unopposed Motion to Compel is GRANTED. Verified, objection-free, responses and responsive documents (if applicable) shall be served within twenty days of this order. Sanctions in the amount of $1,074 are awarded against plaintiffs and in favor of defendant. Sanctions are payable within thirty days of this order.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Thomas W. Purtell, Law offices of Thomas Purtell, Telephone (415) 722-6291, appearing for Plaintiffs Mike Buckley, et al;
Brian Paul Ceballo, Deputy City Attorney City and County of San Francisco, Telpehone (415)554-3911, appearing for Defendant City and County of San francisco;

PLAINTIFF MIKE BUCKLEY'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Amended Responses To Plaintiff Mike Buckley'S Requests For Admission To Defendant City And County Of San Francisco, Set One

Plaintiffs' motion to compel further responses to Requests for Admission, Set One, Nos. 30-49 is granted.
